title: Origins Addon - Canticum
description: Canticum. Latin for Song. The End origin
body:
Canticum: Impact 3:
Voidbound:
Canticum spawn in the outer end dimension, and are unable to leave it.

Chorus Familiar:
You are familiar with the properties of chorus fruit, and as such you can eat popped chorus fruit. However, because you have adapted to this diet, it means you cannot eat any other foods.

Popped Chorus Fruit also gives you levitation!

Levitas:
You can convert the levitation effect into different actives using your ability keys.

Primary launches you in the direction you're looking, and Secondary sends you flying towards the ground. After using either ability you will cause an explosion whenever you next touch the ground!

Weightless:
You are adapted to traverse the end islands at free will. You jump higher, and have natural slow falling.

Resourceful:
You are able to collect earthly resources from end stone. You can also mine it much faster

Artifact Extraction:
You can extract the powers of Void Artifacts in order to gain boosts to your stats!

These include armour, damage and mining speed!

Enlightened:

You cannot wear any accessories, use any tools, or hold any weapons.

Frail Body:

You take more damage whilst airborne, walk slower on land and have 3 less hearts
